Detailed Description

Macro Definition Documentation

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_FAIL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_FAIL (   x)

FAIL - Command Fail Flag 0b0..Error not detected 0b1..Error detected

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDABT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDABT (   x)

CMDABT - Command Abort Flag 0b0..No command abort detected 0b1..Command abort detected

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_PVIOL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_PVIOL (   x)

PVIOL - Command Protection Violation Flag 0b0..No protection violation detected 0b1..Protection violation detected

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_ACCERR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_ACCERR (   x)

ACCERR - Command Access Error Flag 0b0..No access error detected 0b1..Access error detected

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CWSABT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CWSABT (   x)

CWSABT - Command Write Sequence Abort Flag 0b0..Command write sequence not aborted 0b1..Command write sequence aborted

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CCIF [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CCIF (   x)

CCIF - Command Complete Interrupt Flag 0b0..Flash command or initialization in progress 0b1..Flash command or initialization has completed

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDPRT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDPRT (   x)

CMDPRT - Command Protection Level 0b00..Secure, normal access 0b01..Secure, privileged access 0b10..Nonsecure, normal access 0b11..Nonsecure, privileged access

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDP [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDP (   x)

CMDP - Command Protection Status Flag 0b0..Command protection level and domain ID are stale 0b1..Command protection level (CMDPRT) and domain ID (CMDDID) are set

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDDID [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDDID (   x)

CMDDID - Command Domain ID

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_DFDIF [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_DFDIF (   x)

DFDIF - Double Bit Fault Detect Interrupt Flag 0b0..Double bit fault not detected during a valid flash read access from the FMC 0b1..Double bit fault detected (or FCTRL[FDFD] is set) during a valid flash read access from the FMC

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_SALV_USED [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_SALV_USED (   x)

SALV_USED - Salvage Used for Erase operation 0b0..Salvage not used during the last operation 0b1..Salvage used during the last erase operation

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_PEWEN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_PEWEN (   x)

PEWEN - Program-Erase Write Enable Control 0b00..Writes are not enabled 0b01..Writes are enabled for one flash or IFR phrase (phrase programming, sector erase) 0b10..Writes are enabled for one flash or IFR page (page programming) 0b11..Reserved

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_PERDY [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_PERDY (   x)

PERDY - Program/Erase Ready Control/Status Flag 0b0..Program or sector erase command operation is not stalled 0b1..Program or sector erase command operation is stalled

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_CCIE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_CCIE (   x)

CCIE - Command Complete Interrupt Enable 0b0..Command complete interrupt disabled 0b1..Command complete interrupt enabled. An interrupt request is generated whenever the FSTAT[CCIF] flag is set.

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSREQ [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSREQ (   x)

ERSREQ - Mass Erase (Erase All) Request 0b0..No request or request complete 0b1..Request to run the Mass Erase operation

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_DFDIE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_DFDIE (   x)

DFDIE - Double Bit Fault Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Double bit fault detect interrupt disabled 0b1..Double bit fault detect interrupt enabled; an interrupt request is generated whenever the FSTAT[DFDIF] flag is set

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSIEN0 [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSIEN0 (   x)

ERSIEN0 - Erase IFR Sector Enable - Block 0 0b0000..Block 0 IFR Sector X is protected from erase by ERSSCR command 0b0001..Block 0 IFR Sector X is not protected from erase by ERSSCR command

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSIEN1 [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSIEN1 (   x)

ERSIEN1 - Erase IFR Sector Enable - Block 1 (for dual block configs) 0b0000..Block 1 IFR Sector X is protected from erase by ERSSCR command 0b0001..Block 1 IFR Sector X is not protected from erase by ERSSCR command

◆ FMUTEST_FCTRL_RWSC [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCTRL_RWSC (   x)

RWSC - Read Wait-State Control 0b0000..no additional wait-states are added (single cycle access) 0b0001..1 additional wait-state is added 0b0010..2 additional wait-states are added 0b0011..3 additional wait-states are added 0b0100..4 additional wait-states are added 0b0101..5 additional wait-states are added 0b0110..6 additional wait-states are added 0b0111..7 additional wait-states are added 0b1000..8 additional wait-states are added 0b1001..9 additional wait-states are added 0b1010..10 additional wait-states are added 0b1011..11 additional wait-states are added 0b1100..12 additional wait-states are added 0b1101..13 additional wait-states are added 0b1110..14 additional wait-states are added 0b1111..15 additional wait-states are added

◆ FMUTEST_FCTRL_LSACTIVE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCTRL_LSACTIVE (   x)

LSACTIVE - Low Speed Active Mode 0b0..Full speed active mode requested 0b1..Low speed active mode requested

◆ FMUTEST_FCTRL_FDFD [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCTRL_FDFD (   x)

FDFD - Force Double Bit Fault Detect 0b0..FSTAT[DFDIF] sets only if a double bit fault is detected during a valid flash read access from the FMC 0b1..FSTAT[DFDIF] sets during any valid flash read access from the FMC; an interrupt request is generated if the DFDIE bit is set

◆ FMUTEST_FCTRL_ABTREQ [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCTRL_ABTREQ (   x)

ABTREQ - Abort Request 0b0..No request to abort a command write sequence 0b1..Request to abort a command write sequence

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TMECTL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TMECTL (   x)

TMECTL - Test Mode Entry Control 0b0..FTEST register always reads 0 and writes to FTEST are ignored 0b1..FTEST register is readable and can be written to enable writability of TME

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TMEWR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TMEWR (   x)

TMEWR - Test Mode Entry Writable 0b0..TME bit is not writable 0b1..TME bit is writable

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TME [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TME (   x)

TME - Test Mode Entry 0b0..Test mode entry not requested 0b1..Test mode entry requested

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TMODE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TMODE (   x)

TMODE - Test Mode Status 0b0..Test mode not active 0b1..Test mode active

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TMELOCK [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TMELOCK (   x)

TMELOCK - Test Mode Entry Lock 0b0..FTEST register not locked from accepting writes 0b1..FTEST register locked from accepting writes

CMDCODE - Command code

CMDADDR - Command starting address

CMDADDRE - Command ending address

CMDDATA0 - Command data word 0

◆ FMUTEST_FCCOB5_CMDDATA1 [1/2]

CMDDATA1 - Command data word 1

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_ARY_TRIM_DONE (   x)

ARY_TRIM_DONE - Array Trim Complete 0b0..Recall register load operation has not been completed 0b1..Recall register load operation has completed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_FMU_PARM_EN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_FMU_PARM_EN (   x)

FMU_PARM_EN - Status of the C0DE_C0DEh check to enable loading of the FMU parameters 0b0..C0DE_C0DEh check not attempted 0b1..C0DE_C0DEh check completed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_FMU_PARM_DONE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_FMU_PARM_DONE (   x)

FMU_PARM_DONE - FMU Register Load Complete 0b0..FMU registers have not been loaded 0b1..FMU registers have been loaded

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_EN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_EN (   x)

SOC_TRIM_EN - Status of the C0DE_C0DEh check to enable loading of the SoC trim settings 0b0..C0DE_C0DEh check not attempted 0b1..C0DE_C0DEh check completed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_ECC [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_ECC (   x)

SOC_TRIM_ECC - Status of the C0DE_C0DEh check for enabling ECC decoder during reads of SoC trim settings 0b0..C0DE_C0DEh check failed 0b1..C0DE_C0DEh check passed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_DONE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_DONE (   x)

SOC_TRIM_DONE - SoC Trim Complete 0b0..SoC Trim registers have not been updated 0b1..All SoC Trim registers have been updated

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RPR_DONE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RPR_DONE (   x)

RPR_DONE - Array Repair Complete 0b0..Repair registers have not been loaded 0b1..Repair registers have been loaded

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_INIT_DONE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_INIT_DONE (   x)

INIT_DONE - Initialization Done 0b0..All initialization steps did not complete 0b1..All initialization steps completed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_SF_ERR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_SF_ERR (   x)

RST_SF_ERR - ECC Single Fault during Reset Recovery 0b0..No single-bit faults detected during initialization 0b1..At least one single ECC fault was detected during initialization

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_DF_ERR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_DF_ERR (   x)

RST_DF_ERR - ECC Double Fault during Reset Recovery 0b0..No double-bit faults detected during initialization 0b1..Double-bit ECC fault was detected during initialization

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_DF_ERR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_DF_ERR (   x)

SOC_TRIM_DF_ERR - ECC Double Fault during load of SoC Trim phrases

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_PATCH_LD [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_PATCH_LD (   x)

RST_PATCH_LD - Reset Patch Required 0b0..No patch required to be loaded during reset 0b1..Patch loaded during reset

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RECALL_DATA_MISMATCH [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RECALL_DATA_MISMATCH (   x)

RECALL_DATA_MISMATCH - Recall Data Mismatch 0b0..Data read towards end of reset matched data read for Recall 0b1..Data read towards end of reset did not match data read for recall

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_COREHLD [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_COREHLD (   x)

COREHLD - Core Hold 0b0..CPU access is allowed 0b1..CPU access must be blocked

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_LSACT_EN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_LSACT_EN (   x)

LSACT_EN - LSACTIVE Feature Enable 0b0..LSACTIVE feature disabled completely: FCTRL[LSACTIVE] is forced low and no longer writable, LVE cannot assert at the TSMC array interface. 0b1..LSACTIVE feature fully enabled and controllable by SoC and internal UINT SM.

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_LSACTWREN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_LSACTWREN (   x)

LSACTWREN - LSACTIVE Write Enable 0b0..Unrestricted write access allowed 0b1..Write access while CMP set must match CMDDID and CMDPRT

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_MASTER_REPAIR_EN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_MASTER_REPAIR_EN (   x)

MASTER_REPAIR_EN - Master Repair Enable 0b0..Repair disabled 0b1..Repair enable determined by bit 0 of each REPAIR register

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_RFCMDEN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_RFCMDEN (   x)

RFCMDEN - RF Active Command Enable Control 0b0..Flash commands blocked (CCIF not writable) 0b1..Flash commands allowed

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_CWSABTEN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_CWSABTEN (   x)

CWSABTEN - Command Write Sequence Abort Enable 0b0..CWS abort feature is disabled 0b1..CWS abort feature is enabled

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRDDIS [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRDDIS (   x)

MRGRDDIS - Margin Read Disable 0b0..Margin Read Settings are enabled 0b1..Margin Read Settings are disabled

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRD0 (   x)

MRGRD0 - Margin Read Setting for Program

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRD1 [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRD1 (   x)

MRGRD1 - Margin Read Setting for Erase

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_ERSAACK [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_ERSAACK (   x)

ERSAACK - Mass Erase (Erase All) Acknowledge 0b0..Mass Erase operation is not active (operation has completed or has not started) 0b1..Mass Erase operation is active (controller acknowledges that the soc_ersall_req input is asserted and will continue with the operation)

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_SCAN_OBS [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_SCAN_OBS (   x)

SCAN_OBS - Scan Observability Control 0b0..Normal functional behavior 0b1..Enables observation of signals that may otherwise be ATPG untestable

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_BIST_CTL [1/2]

BIST_CTL - BIST IP Control 0b0..BIST IP disabled 0b1..BIST IP enabled

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_SMWR_CTL (   x)

SMWR_CTL - SMWR IP Control 0b0..SMWR IP disabled 0b1..SMWR IP enabled

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_SALV_DIS [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_SALV_DIS (   x)

SALV_DIS - Salvage Disable 0b0..Salvage enabled (ECC used during erase verify) 0b1..Salvage disabled (ECC not used during erase verify)

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_SOC_ECC_CTL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_SOC_ECC_CTL (   x)

SOC_ECC_CTL - SOC ECC Control 0b0..ECC is enabled for SOC read access 0b1..ECC is disabled for SOC read access

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_FMU_ECC_CTL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_FMU_ECC_CTL (   x)

FMU_ECC_CTL - FMU ECC Control 0b0..ECC is enabled for FMU program operations 0b1..ECC is disabled for FMU program operations

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_BIST_PWR_DIS [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_BIST_PWR_DIS (   x)

BIST_PWR_DIS - BIST Power Mode Disable 0b0..BIST DFT logic has full control of SLM and LVE when BIST is enabled (including during commands) 0b1..BIST DFT logic has no control of SLM and LVE; power mode RTL is in complete control of SLM and LVE values

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_OSC_H [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_OSC_H (   x)

OSC_H - Oscillator control 0b0..Use APB clock 0b1..Use a known fixed-frequency clock, e.g. 12 MHz

#define FMUTEST_SMW_CMD_WAIT_CMD (   x)

CMD - SMW Command 0b000..IDLE 0b001..ABORT 0b010..SME2 to one-shot mass erase 0b011..SME3 to sector erase on selected array 0b100..SMP1 to program phrase or page on selected array with shot disabled on previously programmed bit 0b101..Reserved for SME4 (multi-sector erase) 0b110..SMP2 to program phrase or page on selected array to repair cells of weak program after power loss 0b111..Reserved

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_IPSEL0 [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_IPSEL0 (   x)

IPSEL0 - Block 0 Select Control 0b00..Unselect block 0 0b01..not used, reserved 0b10..Enable block 0 test, repair off (default) 0b11..Enable block 0 test, repair on

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_IPSEL1 [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_IPSEL1 (   x)

IPSEL1 - Block 1 Select Control 0b00..Unselect block 1 0b01..not used, reserved 0b10..Enable block 1 test, repair off (default) 0b11..Enable block 1 test, repair on

BIST_CDIVL - Clock Divide Scalar for Long Pulse

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_CDIVS (   x)

CDIVS - Number of clock cycles to generate short pulse

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_BIST_TVFY (   x)

BIST_TVFY - Timer adjust for verify

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_TSTCTL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_TSTCTL (   x)

TSTCTL - BIST self-test control 0b00..Default, disable both BIST self-test and MISR 0b01..Enable BIST self-test mode DOUT from macro will be forced to '0', and disable MISR. 0b10..Enable MISR 0b11..Enable both BIST self-test mode and MISR

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_DBGCTL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_DBGCTL (   x)

DBGCTL - Debug feature control 0b0..Default 0b1..Enable debug feature to collect failure address and data.

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_BIST_CLK_SEL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_BIST_CLK_SEL (   x)

BIST_CLK_SEL - BIST Clock Select

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_SMWTST [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_SMWTST (   x)

SMWTST - SMWR DOUT Function Control 0b00..Default 0b01..Enable SMWR self-test mode, DOUT from macro will be forced to all 0 0b10..Enable SMWR self-test mode, DOUT from macro will be forced to all 1 0b11..Reserved (unused)

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_ECCEN [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_ECCEN (   x)

ECCEN - BIST ECC Control 0b0..Default mode (no ECC encode or decode) 0b1..Enable ECC encode/decode

◆ FMUTEST_R_TESTCODE_TESTCODE [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TESTCODE_TESTCODE (   x)

TESTCODE - Used to store test code information before running TMR-RST/TMRSET BIST command

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_XADR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_XADR (   x)

DFT_XADR - DFT XADR Pattern 0b0000..XADR fixed, no change at all 0b0001..XADR increased by 1 after row. For READ operation, XADR increases by 1 after reading the last word of row. For PROG operation, XADR increases by 1 after NVSTR falls. 0b0010..XADR increased for diagonal. For PROG-DIAGONAL operation, XADR is increased to create diagonal pattern. 0b0011..XADR increased by sector. During ERASE operation, XADR increased by number of rows in a sector when NVSTR falls. 0b0100..XADR inversed. XADR is inversed after reading one word or after programming one row when NVSTR falls. 0b0101..XADR increased by 2 after row. For READ operation, XADR is increased by 2 after reading the last word of a row. For PROG operation, XADR is increased by 2 when NVSTR falls. 0b0110..XADR[0] inversed. XADR[0] is inversed after reading one word or after programming one row when NVSTR falls. 0b0111..XADR increased by 1. For READ operations only, XADR increased by 1 after each read cycle. 0b1000..XADR decreased by 1 after row. For READ operations only, XADR is decreased by 1 after YADR decreases to 0. 0b1001..XADR decreased by 1. For READ operations only, XADR is decreased by 1 after each read cycle.

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_YADR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_YADR (   x)

DFT_YADR - DFT YADR Pattern 0b0000..YADR fixed, no change at all 0b0001..YADR for ICKBD. For PROG and READ operations, YADR changed to generate inverse checkerboard pattern. 0b0010..YADR for CKBD. For PROG and READ operations, YADR changed to generate checkerboard pattern. 0b0011..YADR increased by 1. For READ operations, YADR increased by 1 after each read cycle. For PROG operations, YADR increased by 1 after YE falls. 0b0100..YADR increased for diagonal. For PROG-DIAGONAL operation, YADR is increased to create diagonal pattern. 0b0101..YADR inversed. YADR is inversed after reading one word or after programming one word when YE falls. 0b0110..YADR[0] inversed. YADR[0] is inversed after reading one word or after programming one word when YE falls. 0b0111..YADR increased by 1 after last row. For READ operations only, YADR is increased by 1 after XADR reaches last row. 0b1000..YADR decreased by 1. For READ operations only, YADR is decreased by 1 after each read cycle. 0b1001..YADR decreased by 1 after first row. For READ operations only, YADR is decreased by 1 after XADR decreases to 0.

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_DATA [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_DATA (   x)

DFT_DATA - DFT Data Pattern 0b0000..CKBD pattern. For READ operations only, compare DOUT with checkerboard data pattern for each read cycle. 0b0001..ICKBD pattern. For READ operations only, compare DOUT with inverse checkerboard data pattern for each read cycle. 0b0010..Diagonal pattern. Used for READ operations only, compare DOUT to diagonal pattern. 0b0011..Fixed data pattern. For READ operations, comparison to DOUT for selected groups; refer to R_ADR_CTRL[GRPSEL] for modules with multiple groups. 0b0100..Random data pattern which will be generated based on the initial seed set in R_DATA; for READ operations, used for DOUT comparison of selected groups. For PROG operations, used to control DIN of selected groups. 0b0101..DOUT based pattern. For READ operations only, DOUT of selected group will be latched in R_DATA. If more than one group is selected in R_ADR_CTRL[GRPSEL], the group with the lower index will be latched. 0b0110..R_DATA based pattern. For READ operations, expected DOUT value of selected groups equals to R_DATA when XADR[0]==YADR[0] or ~R_DATA when XADR[0]!=YADR[0]. For PROG operations, DIN of selected groups equals R_DATA when XADR[0]==YADR[0] or ~R_DATA when XADR[0]!=YADR[0]. 0b0111..SCAN-IO pattern. For READ operations, control expected DOUT value of selected groups to SCAN-IO data pattern. For PROG operations, control DIN of selected groups to SCAN-IO data pattern. 0b1000..REPAIR set. For PROG operation to IFR1(7,1) and IFR1(7,2), R_REPAIR0_0 and R_REPAIR0_1 or R_REPAIR1_0 and R_REPAIR1_1 will control DIN. For READ operation on IFR1(7,1) and IFR1(7,2), DOUT will be compared against R_REPAIR0_0 and R_REPAIR0_1 or R_REPAIR1_0 andR_REPAIR1_1. When this option is selected, only one flash block can be selected. 0b1001..REPAIR load. For READ operation only, DOUT from IFR1(7,1) and IFR1(7,2) is loaded to R_REPAIR0 and R_REPAIR1.

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_CMP_MASK [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_CMP_MASK (   x)

CMP_MASK - Data Compare Mask 0b00..Expected data is compared to DOUT 0b01..Expected data (only 0s are considered) are compared to DOUT 0b10..Expected data (only 1s are considered) are compared to DOUT

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_DATA_SRC [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_DATA_SRC (   x)

DFT_DATA_SRC - DFT Data Source 0b0..{R_DATA_CTRL0,R_DATA_CTRL_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL0,R_DATA_CTRL_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL0,R_DATA_CTRL_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL0} is used 0b1..{R_DATA_CTRL3,R_DATA_CTRL2_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL2,R_DATA_CTRL1_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL1,R_DATA_CTRL_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL0} is used

◆ FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_GRPSEL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_GRPSEL (   x)

GRPSEL - Data Group Select 0b0000..Select no data 0b0001..Select data slice [34:0] 0b0010..Select data slice [69:35] 0b0100..Select data slice [104:70] 0b1000..Select data slice [136:105] 0b1111..Select data [136:0]

◆ FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_XADR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_XADR (   x)

XADR - BIST XADR

◆ FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_YADR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_YADR (   x)

YADR - BIST YADR

◆ FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_PROG_ATTR [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_PROG_ATTR (   x)

PROG_ATTR - Program Attribute 0b000..One YE pulse will program one data slice group 0b001..One YE pulse will program two data slice groups 0b010..One YE pulse will program three data slice groups (reserved) 0b011..One YE pulse will program four data slice groups 0b100..One YE pulse will program five data slice groups (reserved) 0b101..One YE pulse will program six data slice groups (reserved) 0b110..One YE pulse will program seven data slice groups (reserved) 0b111..One YE pulse will program eight data slice groups (reserved)

XE - X Address Enable

◆ FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_YE [1/2]

ERASE - Erase Mode

SLM - Sleep Mode Enable

◆ FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_RECALL [1/2]

RECALL - Recall Trim Code

◆ FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_HEM [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_HEM (   x)

HEM - HEM Control

◆ FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPCNT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPCNT (   x)

LOOPCNT - Loop Count Control

◆ FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPOPT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPOPT (   x)

LOOPOPT - Loop Option 0b000..Loop is disabled; selected BIST operation is run once 0b001..Loop is enabled; XADR increments by 1 XADR increments by 1 for each new loop. Stops when total loop count meets LOOPCNT+1. 0b010..Loop is enabled; YADR increments by 1 YADR increments by 1 for each new loop. Stops when total loop count meets LOOPCNT+1. 0b011..Loop is enabled; XADR increments by 2 XADR increments by 2 for each new loop. Stops when total loop count meets LOOPCNT+1. 0b100..Loop is enabled; XADR increments by sector XADR increments by 16 for each new loop. Stops when total loop count meets LOOPCNT+1.

◆ FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPUNIT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPUNIT (   x)

LOOPUNIT - Loop Time Unit 0b000..Clock cycles 0b001..0.5 usec 0b010..1 usec 0b011..10 usec 0b100..100 usec 0b101..1 msec 0b110..10 msec 0b111..100 msec

◆ FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPDLY [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPDLY (   x)

LOOPDLY - Loop Time Delay Scalar

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TNVSUNIT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TNVSUNIT (   x)

TNVSUNIT - Tnvs Time Unit 0b000..Clock cycles 0b001..0.5 usec 0b010..1 usec 0b011..10 usec 0b100..100 usec 0b101..1 msec 0b110..10 msec 0b111..100 msec

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TNVSDLY [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TNVSDLY (   x)

TNVSDLY - Tnvs Time Delay Scalar

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TNVHUNIT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TNVHUNIT (   x)

TNVHUNIT - Tnvh Time Unit 0b000..Clock cycles 0b001..0.5 usec 0b010..1 usec 0b011..10 usec 0b100..100 usec 0b101..1 msec 0b110..10 msec 0b111..100 msec

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TNVHDLY [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TNVHDLY (   x)

TNVHDLY - Tnvh Time Delay Scalar

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TPGSUNIT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TPGSUNIT (   x)

TPGSUNIT - Tpgs Time Unit 0b000..Clock cycles 0b001..0.5 usec 0b010..1 usec 0b011..10 usec 0b100..100 usec 0b101..1 msec 0b110..10 msec 0b111..100 msec

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TPGSDLY [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TPGSDLY (   x)

TPGSDLY - Tpgs Time Delay Scalar

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TRCVUNIT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TRCVUNIT (   x)

TRCVUNIT - Trcv Time Unit 0b000..Clock cycles 0b001..0.5 usec 0b010..1 usec 0b011..10 usec 0b100..100 usec 0b101..1 msec 0b110..10 msec 0b111..100 msec

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TRCVDLY [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TRCVDLY (   x)

TRCVDLY - Trcv Time Delay Scalar

◆ FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TLVSUNIT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TIMER_CTRL_TLVSUNIT (   x)

TLVSUNIT - Tlvs Time Unit 0b000..Clock cycles 0b001..0.5 usec 0b010..1 usec 0b011..10 usec 0b100..100 usec 0b101..1 msec 0b110..10 msec 0b111..100 msec

#define FMUTEST_SMW_SETTING_OPTION2_TPGM_OPT (   x)

#define FMUTEST_MAX_PULSE_CNT_LAST_PCNT (   x)

LAST_PCNT - Last SMW Operation's Pulse Count

◆ FMUTEST_MAX_PULSE_CNT_MAX_ERS_CNT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MAX_PULSE_CNT_MAX_ERS_CNT (   x)

MAX_ERS_CNT - Maximum Erase Pulse Count

◆ FMUTEST_MAX_PULSE_CNT_MAX_PGM_CNT [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_MAX_PULSE_CNT_MAX_PGM_CNT (   x)

MAX_PGM_CNT - Maximum Program Pulse Count

◆ FMUTEST_PORT_CTRL_BDONE_SEL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_PORT_CTRL_BDONE_SEL (   x)

BDONE_SEL - BIST Done Select 0b00..Select internal bist_done signal from current module instantiation 0b01..Select ipt_bist_fail signal from current module instantiation 0b10..Select ipt_bist_done signal from other module instantiation 0b11..Select AND of internal bist_done signal from current module instantiation with ipt_bist_done signal from other module instantiation

◆ FMUTEST_PORT_CTRL_BSDO_SEL [1/2]

#define FMUTEST_PORT_CTRL_BSDO_SEL (   x)

BSDO_SEL - BIST Serial Data Output Select 0b00..Select internal bist_sdo signal from current module instantiation 0b01..Select ipt_bist_done signal from current module instantiation 0b10..Select ipt_bist_sdo signal from other module instantiation 0b11..Select ipt_bist_done signal from other module instantiation

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_FAIL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_FAIL (   x)

FAIL - Command Fail Flag 0b0..Error not detected 0b1..Error detected

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDABT [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDABT (   x)

CMDABT - Command Abort Flag 0b0..No command abort detected 0b1..Command abort detected

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_PVIOL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_PVIOL (   x)

PVIOL - Command Protection Violation Flag 0b0..No protection violation detected 0b1..Protection violation detected

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_ACCERR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_ACCERR (   x)

ACCERR - Command Access Error Flag 0b0..No access error detected 0b1..Access error detected

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CWSABT [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CWSABT (   x)

CWSABT - Command Write Sequence Abort Flag 0b0..Command write sequence not aborted 0b1..Command write sequence aborted

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CCIF [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CCIF (   x)

CCIF - Command Complete Interrupt Flag 0b0..Flash command or initialization in progress 0b1..Flash command or initialization has completed

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDPRT [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDPRT (   x)

CMDPRT - Command Protection Level 0b00..Secure, normal access 0b01..Secure, privileged access 0b10..Nonsecure, normal access 0b11..Nonsecure, privileged access

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDP [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDP (   x)

CMDP - Command Protection Status Flag 0b0..Command protection level and domain ID are stale 0b1..Command protection level (CMDPRT) and domain ID (CMDDID) are set

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDDID [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_CMDDID (   x)

CMDDID - Command Domain ID

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_DFDIF [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_DFDIF (   x)

DFDIF - Double Bit Fault Detect Interrupt Flag 0b0..Double bit fault not detected during a valid flash read access from the FMC 0b1..Double bit fault detected (or FCTRL[FDFD] is set) during a valid flash read access from the FMC

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_SALV_USED [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_SALV_USED (   x)

SALV_USED - Salvage Used for Erase operation 0b0..Salvage not used during the last operation 0b1..Salvage used during the last erase operation

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_PEWEN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_PEWEN (   x)

PEWEN - Program-Erase Write Enable Control 0b00..Writes are not enabled 0b01..Writes are enabled for one flash or IFR phrase (phrase programming, sector erase) 0b10..Writes are enabled for one flash or IFR page (page programming) 0b11..Reserved

◆ FMUTEST_FSTAT_PERDY [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FSTAT_PERDY (   x)

PERDY - Program/Erase Ready Control/Status Flag 0b0..Program or sector erase command operation is not stalled 0b1..Program or sector erase command operation is stalled

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_CCIE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_CCIE (   x)

CCIE - Command Complete Interrupt Enable 0b0..Command complete interrupt disabled 0b1..Command complete interrupt enabled. An interrupt request is generated whenever the FSTAT[CCIF] flag is set.

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSREQ [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSREQ (   x)

ERSREQ - Mass Erase (Erase All) Request 0b0..No request or request complete 0b1..Request to run the Mass Erase operation

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_DFDIE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_DFDIE (   x)

DFDIE - Double Bit Fault Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Double bit fault detect interrupt disabled 0b1..Double bit fault detect interrupt enabled; an interrupt request is generated whenever the FSTAT[DFDIF] flag is set

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSIEN0 [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSIEN0 (   x)

ERSIEN0 - Erase IFR Sector Enable - Block 0 0b0000..Block 0 IFR Sector X is protected from erase by ERSSCR command 0b0001..Block 0 IFR Sector X is not protected from erase by ERSSCR command

◆ FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSIEN1 [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCNFG_ERSIEN1 (   x)

ERSIEN1 - Erase IFR Sector Enable - Block 1 (for dual block configs) 0b0000..Block 1 IFR Sector X is protected from erase by ERSSCR command 0b0001..Block 1 IFR Sector X is not protected from erase by ERSSCR command

◆ FMUTEST_FCTRL_RWSC [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCTRL_RWSC (   x)

RWSC - Read Wait-State Control 0b0000..no additional wait-states are added (single cycle access) 0b0001..1 additional wait-state is added 0b0010..2 additional wait-states are added 0b0011..3 additional wait-states are added 0b0100..4 additional wait-states are added 0b0101..5 additional wait-states are added 0b0110..6 additional wait-states are added 0b0111..7 additional wait-states are added 0b1000..8 additional wait-states are added 0b1001..9 additional wait-states are added 0b1010..10 additional wait-states are added 0b1011..11 additional wait-states are added 0b1100..12 additional wait-states are added 0b1101..13 additional wait-states are added 0b1110..14 additional wait-states are added 0b1111..15 additional wait-states are added

◆ FMUTEST_FCTRL_LSACTIVE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCTRL_LSACTIVE (   x)

LSACTIVE - Low Speed Active Mode 0b0..Full speed active mode requested 0b1..Low speed active mode requested

◆ FMUTEST_FCTRL_FDFD [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCTRL_FDFD (   x)

FDFD - Force Double Bit Fault Detect 0b0..FSTAT[DFDIF] sets only if a double bit fault is detected during a valid flash read access from the FMC 0b1..FSTAT[DFDIF] sets during any valid flash read access from the FMC; an interrupt request is generated if the DFDIE bit is set

◆ FMUTEST_FCTRL_ABTREQ [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCTRL_ABTREQ (   x)

ABTREQ - Abort Request 0b0..No request to abort a command write sequence 0b1..Request to abort a command write sequence

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TMECTL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TMECTL (   x)

TMECTL - Test Mode Entry Control 0b0..FTEST register always reads 0 and writes to FTEST are ignored 0b1..FTEST register is readable and can be written to enable writability of TME

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TMEWR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TMEWR (   x)

TMEWR - Test Mode Entry Writable 0b0..TME bit is not writable 0b1..TME bit is writable

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TME [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TME (   x)

TME - Test Mode Entry 0b0..Test mode entry not requested 0b1..Test mode entry requested

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TMODE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TMODE (   x)

TMODE - Test Mode Status 0b0..Test mode not active 0b1..Test mode active

◆ FMUTEST_FTEST_TMELOCK [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FTEST_TMELOCK (   x)

TMELOCK - Test Mode Entry Lock 0b0..FTEST register not locked from accepting writes 0b1..FTEST register locked from accepting writes

#define FMUTEST_FCCOB0_CMDCODE (   x)

CMDCODE - Command code

◆ FMUTEST_FCCOB1_CMDOPT [2/2]

CMDOPT - Command options

◆ FMUTEST_FCCOB2_CMDADDR [2/2]

CMDADDR - Command starting address

◆ FMUTEST_FCCOB3_CMDADDRE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCCOB3_CMDADDRE (   x)

CMDADDRE - Command ending address

◆ FMUTEST_FCCOB4_CMDDATA0 [2/2]

CMDDATA0 - Command data word 0

◆ FMUTEST_FCCOB5_CMDDATA1 [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_FCCOB5_CMDDATA1 (   x)

CMDDATA1 - Command data word 1

◆ FMUTEST_FCCOB6_CMDDATA2 [2/2]

CMDDATA2 - Command data word 2

◆ FMUTEST_FCCOB7_CMDDATA3 [2/2]

CMDDATA3 - Command data word 3

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_ARY_TRIM_DONE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_ARY_TRIM_DONE (   x)

ARY_TRIM_DONE - Array Trim Complete 0b0..Recall register load operation has not been completed 0b1..Recall register load operation has completed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_FMU_PARM_EN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_FMU_PARM_EN (   x)

FMU_PARM_EN - Status of the C0DE_C0DEh check to enable loading of the FMU parameters 0b0..C0DE_C0DEh check not attempted 0b1..C0DE_C0DEh check completed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_FMU_PARM_DONE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_FMU_PARM_DONE (   x)

FMU_PARM_DONE - FMU Register Load Complete 0b0..FMU registers have not been loaded 0b1..FMU registers have been loaded

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_EN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_EN (   x)

SOC_TRIM_EN - Status of the C0DE_C0DEh check to enable loading of the SoC trim settings 0b0..C0DE_C0DEh check not attempted 0b1..C0DE_C0DEh check completed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_ECC [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_ECC (   x)

SOC_TRIM_ECC - Status of the C0DE_C0DEh check for enabling ECC decoder during reads of SoC trim settings 0b0..C0DE_C0DEh check failed 0b1..C0DE_C0DEh check passed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_DONE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_DONE (   x)

SOC_TRIM_DONE - SoC Trim Complete 0b0..SoC Trim registers have not been updated 0b1..All SoC Trim registers have been updated

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RPR_DONE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RPR_DONE (   x)

RPR_DONE - Array Repair Complete 0b0..Repair registers have not been loaded 0b1..Repair registers have been loaded

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_INIT_DONE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_INIT_DONE (   x)

INIT_DONE - Initialization Done 0b0..All initialization steps did not complete 0b1..All initialization steps completed

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_SF_ERR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_SF_ERR (   x)

RST_SF_ERR - ECC Single Fault during Reset Recovery 0b0..No single-bit faults detected during initialization 0b1..At least one single ECC fault was detected during initialization

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_DF_ERR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_DF_ERR (   x)

RST_DF_ERR - ECC Double Fault during Reset Recovery 0b0..No double-bit faults detected during initialization 0b1..Double-bit ECC fault was detected during initialization

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_DF_ERR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_SOC_TRIM_DF_ERR (   x)

SOC_TRIM_DF_ERR - ECC Double Fault during load of SoC Trim phrases

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_PATCH_LD [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RST_PATCH_LD (   x)

RST_PATCH_LD - Reset Patch Required 0b0..No patch required to be loaded during reset 0b1..Patch loaded during reset

◆ FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RECALL_DATA_MISMATCH [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_RESET_STATUS_RECALL_DATA_MISMATCH (   x)

RECALL_DATA_MISMATCH - Recall Data Mismatch 0b0..Data read towards end of reset matched data read for Recall 0b1..Data read towards end of reset did not match data read for recall

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_COREHLD [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_COREHLD (   x)

COREHLD - Core Hold 0b0..CPU access is allowed 0b1..CPU access must be blocked

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_LSACT_EN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_LSACT_EN (   x)

LSACT_EN - LSACTIVE Feature Enable 0b0..LSACTIVE feature disabled completely: FCTRL[LSACTIVE] is forced low and no longer writable, LVE cannot assert at the TSMC array interface. 0b1..LSACTIVE feature fully enabled and controllable by SoC and internal UINT SM.

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_LSACTWREN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_LSACTWREN (   x)

LSACTWREN - LSACTIVE Write Enable 0b0..Unrestricted write access allowed 0b1..Write access while CMP set must match CMDDID and CMDPRT

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_MASTER_REPAIR_EN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_MASTER_REPAIR_EN (   x)

MASTER_REPAIR_EN - Master Repair Enable 0b0..Repair disabled 0b1..Repair enable determined by bit 0 of each REPAIR register

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_RFCMDEN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_RFCMDEN (   x)

RFCMDEN - RF Active Command Enable Control 0b0..Flash commands blocked (CCIF not writable) 0b1..Flash commands allowed

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_CWSABTEN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_CWSABTEN (   x)

CWSABTEN - Command Write Sequence Abort Enable 0b0..CWS abort feature is disabled 0b1..CWS abort feature is enabled

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRDDIS [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRDDIS (   x)

MRGRDDIS - Margin Read Disable 0b0..Margin Read Settings are enabled 0b1..Margin Read Settings are disabled

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRD0 [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRD0 (   x)

MRGRD0 - Margin Read Setting for Program

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRD1 [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_MRGRD1 (   x)

MRGRD1 - Margin Read Setting for Erase

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_ERSAACK [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_ERSAACK (   x)

ERSAACK - Mass Erase (Erase All) Acknowledge 0b0..Mass Erase operation is not active (operation has completed or has not started) 0b1..Mass Erase operation is active (controller acknowledges that the soc_ersall_req input is asserted and will continue with the operation)

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_SCAN_OBS [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_SCAN_OBS (   x)

SCAN_OBS - Scan Observability Control 0b0..Normal functional behavior 0b1..Enables observation of signals that may otherwise be ATPG untestable

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_BIST_CTL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_BIST_CTL (   x)

BIST_CTL - BIST IP Control 0b0..BIST IP disabled 0b1..BIST IP enabled

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_SMWR_CTL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_SMWR_CTL (   x)

SMWR_CTL - SMWR IP Control 0b0..SMWR IP disabled 0b1..SMWR IP enabled

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_SALV_DIS [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_SALV_DIS (   x)

SALV_DIS - Salvage Disable 0b0..Salvage enabled (ECC used during erase verify) 0b1..Salvage disabled (ECC not used during erase verify)

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_SOC_ECC_CTL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_SOC_ECC_CTL (   x)

SOC_ECC_CTL - SOC ECC Control 0b0..ECC is enabled for SOC read access 0b1..ECC is disabled for SOC read access

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_FMU_ECC_CTL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_FMU_ECC_CTL (   x)

FMU_ECC_CTL - FMU ECC Control 0b0..ECC is enabled for FMU program operations 0b1..ECC is disabled for FMU program operations

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_BIST_PWR_DIS [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_BIST_PWR_DIS (   x)

BIST_PWR_DIS - BIST Power Mode Disable 0b0..BIST DFT logic has full control of SLM and LVE when BIST is enabled (including during commands) 0b1..BIST DFT logic has no control of SLM and LVE; power mode RTL is in complete control of SLM and LVE values

◆ FMUTEST_MCTL_OSC_H [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_MCTL_OSC_H (   x)

OSC_H - Oscillator control 0b0..Use APB clock 0b1..Use a known fixed-frequency clock, e.g. 12 MHz

MBSEL_GEN - Generated MBSEL

PD_CDIV - Power Down Clock Divider Setting

◆ FMUTEST_PWR_OPT_SLM_COUNT [2/2]

◆ FMUTEST_PWR_OPT_PD_TIMER_EN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_PWR_OPT_PD_TIMER_EN (   x)

PD_TIMER_EN - Power Down BIST Timer Enable 0b0..BIST timer is not triggered during Power Down recovery 0b1..BIST timer is triggered during Power Down recovery (default behavior)

#define FMUTEST_CMD_CHECK_ALIGNFAIL_PHR (   x)

ALIGNFAIL_PHR - Phrase Alignment Fail 0b0..The address is phrase-aligned 0b1..The address is not phrase-aligned

ALIGNFAIL_PG - Page Alignment Fail 0b0..The address is page-aligned 0b1..The address is not page-aligned

ALIGNFAIL_SCR - Sector Alignment Fail 0b0..The address is sector-aligned 0b1..The address is not sector-aligned

ALIGNFAIL_BLK - Block Alignment Fail 0b0..The address is block-aligned 0b1..The address is not block-aligned

◆ FMUTEST_CMD_CHECK_ADDR_FAIL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_CMD_CHECK_ADDR_FAIL (   x)

ADDR_FAIL - Address Fail 0b0..The address is within the flash or IFR address space 0b1..The address is outside the flash or IFR address space

◆ FMUTEST_CMD_CHECK_IFR_CMD [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_CMD_CHECK_IFR_CMD (   x)

IFR_CMD - IFR Command 0b0..The command operates on a main flash address 0b1..The command operates on an IFR address

#define FMUTEST_CMD_CHECK_SCR_ALIGN_CHK (   x)

ILLEGAL_CMD - Illegal Command 0b0..Command is legal 0b1..Command is illegal

◆ FMUTEST_MM_CTL_MM_RD [2/2]

◆ FMUTEST_MM_CTL_BIST_ON [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_SMW_CMD_WAIT_CMD (   x)

CMD - SMW Command 0b000..IDLE 0b001..ABORT 0b010..SME2 to one-shot mass erase 0b011..SME3 to sector erase on selected array 0b100..SMP1 to program phrase or page on selected array with shot disabled on previously programmed bit 0b101..Reserved for SME4 (multi-sector erase) 0b110..SMP2 to program phrase or page on selected array to repair cells of weak program after power loss 0b111..Reserved

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_IPSEL0 (   x)

IPSEL0 - Block 0 Select Control 0b00..Unselect block 0 0b01..not used, reserved 0b10..Enable block 0 test, repair off (default) 0b11..Enable block 0 test, repair on

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_IPSEL1 [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_IPSEL1 (   x)

IPSEL1 - Block 1 Select Control 0b00..Unselect block 1 0b01..not used, reserved 0b10..Enable block 1 test, repair off (default) 0b11..Enable block 1 test, repair on

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_BIST_CDIVL (   x)

BIST_CDIVL - Clock Divide Scalar for Long Pulse

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_CDIVS [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_CDIVS (   x)

CDIVS - Number of clock cycles to generate short pulse

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_BIST_TVFY (   x)

BIST_TVFY - Timer adjust for verify

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_TSTCTL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_TSTCTL (   x)

TSTCTL - BIST self-test control 0b00..Default, disable both BIST self-test and MISR 0b01..Enable BIST self-test mode DOUT from macro will be forced to '0', and disable MISR. 0b10..Enable MISR 0b11..Enable both BIST self-test mode and MISR

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_DBGCTL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_DBGCTL (   x)

DBGCTL - Debug feature control 0b0..Default 0b1..Enable debug feature to collect failure address and data.

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_BIST_CLK_SEL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_BIST_CLK_SEL (   x)

BIST_CLK_SEL - BIST Clock Select

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_SMWTST [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_SMWTST (   x)

SMWTST - SMWR DOUT Function Control 0b00..Default 0b01..Enable SMWR self-test mode, DOUT from macro will be forced to all 0 0b10..Enable SMWR self-test mode, DOUT from macro will be forced to all 1 0b11..Reserved (unused)

◆ FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_ECCEN [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_IP_CONFIG_ECCEN (   x)

ECCEN - BIST ECC Control 0b0..Default mode (no ECC encode or decode) 0b1..Enable ECC encode/decode

◆ FMUTEST_R_TESTCODE_TESTCODE [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_TESTCODE_TESTCODE (   x)

TESTCODE - Used to store test code information before running TMR-RST/TMRSET BIST command

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_XADR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_XADR (   x)

DFT_XADR - DFT XADR Pattern 0b0000..XADR fixed, no change at all 0b0001..XADR increased by 1 after row. For READ operation, XADR increases by 1 after reading the last word of row. For PROG operation, XADR increases by 1 after NVSTR falls. 0b0010..XADR increased for diagonal. For PROG-DIAGONAL operation, XADR is increased to create diagonal pattern. 0b0011..XADR increased by sector. During ERASE operation, XADR increased by number of rows in a sector when NVSTR falls. 0b0100..XADR inversed. XADR is inversed after reading one word or after programming one row when NVSTR falls. 0b0101..XADR increased by 2 after row. For READ operation, XADR is increased by 2 after reading the last word of a row. For PROG operation, XADR is increased by 2 when NVSTR falls. 0b0110..XADR[0] inversed. XADR[0] is inversed after reading one word or after programming one row when NVSTR falls. 0b0111..XADR increased by 1. For READ operations only, XADR increased by 1 after each read cycle. 0b1000..XADR decreased by 1 after row. For READ operations only, XADR is decreased by 1 after YADR decreases to 0. 0b1001..XADR decreased by 1. For READ operations only, XADR is decreased by 1 after each read cycle.

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_YADR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_YADR (   x)

DFT_YADR - DFT YADR Pattern 0b0000..YADR fixed, no change at all 0b0001..YADR for ICKBD. For PROG and READ operations, YADR changed to generate inverse checkerboard pattern. 0b0010..YADR for CKBD. For PROG and READ operations, YADR changed to generate checkerboard pattern. 0b0011..YADR increased by 1. For READ operations, YADR increased by 1 after each read cycle. For PROG operations, YADR increased by 1 after YE falls. 0b0100..YADR increased for diagonal. For PROG-DIAGONAL operation, YADR is increased to create diagonal pattern. 0b0101..YADR inversed. YADR is inversed after reading one word or after programming one word when YE falls. 0b0110..YADR[0] inversed. YADR[0] is inversed after reading one word or after programming one word when YE falls. 0b0111..YADR increased by 1 after last row. For READ operations only, YADR is increased by 1 after XADR reaches last row. 0b1000..YADR decreased by 1. For READ operations only, YADR is decreased by 1 after each read cycle. 0b1001..YADR decreased by 1 after first row. For READ operations only, YADR is decreased by 1 after XADR decreases to 0.

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_DATA [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_DATA (   x)

DFT_DATA - DFT Data Pattern 0b0000..CKBD pattern. For READ operations only, compare DOUT with checkerboard data pattern for each read cycle. 0b0001..ICKBD pattern. For READ operations only, compare DOUT with inverse checkerboard data pattern for each read cycle. 0b0010..Diagonal pattern. Used for READ operations only, compare DOUT to diagonal pattern. 0b0011..Fixed data pattern. For READ operations, comparison to DOUT for selected groups; refer to R_ADR_CTRL[GRPSEL] for modules with multiple groups. 0b0100..Random data pattern which will be generated based on the initial seed set in R_DATA; for READ operations, used for DOUT comparison of selected groups. For PROG operations, used to control DIN of selected groups. 0b0101..DOUT based pattern. For READ operations only, DOUT of selected group will be latched in R_DATA. If more than one group is selected in R_ADR_CTRL[GRPSEL], the group with the lower index will be latched. 0b0110..R_DATA based pattern. For READ operations, expected DOUT value of selected groups equals to R_DATA when XADR[0]==YADR[0] or ~R_DATA when XADR[0]!=YADR[0]. For PROG operations, DIN of selected groups equals R_DATA when XADR[0]==YADR[0] or ~R_DATA when XADR[0]!=YADR[0]. 0b0111..SCAN-IO pattern. For READ operations, control expected DOUT value of selected groups to SCAN-IO data pattern. For PROG operations, control DIN of selected groups to SCAN-IO data pattern. 0b1000..REPAIR set. For PROG operation to IFR1(7,1) and IFR1(7,2), R_REPAIR0_0 and R_REPAIR0_1 or R_REPAIR1_0 and R_REPAIR1_1 will control DIN. For READ operation on IFR1(7,1) and IFR1(7,2), DOUT will be compared against R_REPAIR0_0 and R_REPAIR0_1 or R_REPAIR1_0 andR_REPAIR1_1. When this option is selected, only one flash block can be selected. 0b1001..REPAIR load. For READ operation only, DOUT from IFR1(7,1) and IFR1(7,2) is loaded to R_REPAIR0 and R_REPAIR1.

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_CMP_MASK [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_CMP_MASK (   x)

CMP_MASK - Data Compare Mask 0b00..Expected data is compared to DOUT 0b01..Expected data (only 0s are considered) are compared to DOUT 0b10..Expected data (only 1s are considered) are compared to DOUT

◆ FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_DATA_SRC [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_DFT_CTRL_DFT_DATA_SRC (   x)

DFT_DATA_SRC - DFT Data Source 0b0..{R_DATA_CTRL0,R_DATA_CTRL_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL0,R_DATA_CTRL_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL0,R_DATA_CTRL_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL0} is used 0b1..{R_DATA_CTRL3,R_DATA_CTRL2_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL2,R_DATA_CTRL1_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL1,R_DATA_CTRL_EX[2:0],R_DATA_CTRL0} is used

◆ FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_GRPSEL [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_GRPSEL (   x)

GRPSEL - Data Group Select 0b0000..Select no data 0b0001..Select data slice [34:0] 0b0010..Select data slice [69:35] 0b0100..Select data slice [104:70] 0b1000..Select data slice [136:105] 0b1111..Select data [136:0]

◆ FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_XADR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_XADR (   x)

XADR - BIST XADR

◆ FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_YADR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_YADR (   x)

YADR - BIST YADR

◆ FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_PROG_ATTR [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_ADR_CTRL_PROG_ATTR (   x)

PROG_ATTR - Program Attribute 0b000..One YE pulse will program one data slice group 0b001..One YE pulse will program two data slice groups 0b010..One YE pulse will program three data slice groups (reserved) 0b011..One YE pulse will program four data slice groups 0b100..One YE pulse will program five data slice groups (reserved) 0b101..One YE pulse will program six data slice groups (reserved) 0b110..One YE pulse will program seven data slice groups (reserved) 0b111..One YE pulse will program eight data slice groups (reserved)

DATA0 - BIST Data 0 Low

◆ FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_WHV [2/2]

XE - X Address Enable

◆ FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_YE [2/2]

◆ FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_PROG [2/2]

PROG - Program Mode

NVSTR - NVM Store

◆ FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_SLM [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_SLM (   x)

SLM - Sleep Mode Enable

RECALL - Recall Trim Code

◆ FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_HEM [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_PIN_CTRL_HEM (   x)

HEM - HEM Control

◆ FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPCNT [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPCNT (   x)

LOOPCNT - Loop Count Control

◆ FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPOPT [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPOPT (   x)

LOOPOPT - Loop Option 0b000..Loop is disabled; selected BIST operation is run once 0b001..Loop is enabled; XADR increments by 1 XADR increments by 1 for each new loop. Stops when total loop count meets LOOPCNT+1. 0b010..Loop is enabled; YADR increments by 1 YADR increments by 1 for each new loop. Stops when total loop count meets LOOPCNT+1. 0b011..Loop is enabled; XADR increments by 2 XADR increments by 2 for each new loop. Stops when total loop count meets LOOPCNT+1. 0b100..Loop is enabled; XADR increments by sector XADR increments by 16 for each new loop. Stops when total loop count meets LOOPCNT+1.

◆ FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPUNIT [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_R_CNT_LOOP_CTRL_LOOPUNIT (   x)

LOOPUNIT - Loop Time Unit 0b000..Clock cycles 0b001..0.5 usec 0b010..1 usec 0b011..10 usec 0b100..100 usec 0b101..1 msec 0b110..10 msec 0b111..100 msec

LOOPDLY - Loop Time Delay Scalar

#define FMUTEST_SMW_SETTING_OPTION2_VFY_OPT (   x)

VFY_OPT - Verify Option 0b00..Skip verify for post shot only, verify for all other shots 0b01..Skip verify for the 1st and post shots 0b10..Skip the 1st, 2nd, and post shots 0b11..Skip verify for all shots

◆ FMUTEST_SMW_SETTING_OPTION2_TPGM_OPT [2/2]

#define FMUTEST_SMW_SETTING_OPTION2_TPGM_OPT (   x)

TPGM_OPT - Tpgm Option 0b00..Fixed Tpgm for all shots, except post shot 0b01..Increase Tpgm option by 1 for each loop until Tpgm reaches 4 usec 0b10..Increase Tpgm option by 1 for each loop until Tpgm reaches 8 usec 0b11..Unused
